name: Biscohos
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually add dry ingredients (flour mixture) to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Form small balls of dough about the size of a teaspoon.
5. Place the dough balls on a greased cookie sheet and press down with your thumb to flatten slightly.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon while the cookies are still hot.
